How to use a diffrent VulkanSDK version?

First, download the wanted VulkanSDK version
    website: https://vulkan.lunarg.com/sdk/home

After installing, create a new folder named after the VulkanSDK version
    - copy the License.txt from %VulkanSDK/Licenses/LICENSE.txt
    - create a "include" folder containing everything from $VulkanSDK/Include
    - create a "lib" folder where you put
	    - %VulkanSDK/Lib/vulkan-1.lib
        - %VulkanSDK/Lib/shaderc_sharedd.lib
	    - %VulkanSDK/Lib/spirv-cross-cored.lib
        - %VulkanSDK/Lib/shaderc_shared.lib
	    - %VulkanSDK/Lib/spirv-cross-core.lib
    - create a "bin" folder where you put
        - %VulkanSDK/Lib/shaderc_shared.dll
        - %VulkanSDK/Lib/shaderc_sharedd.dll

maybe you need to replace the glslangValidator.exe in Resources/Shaders with the %VulkanSDK/Bin/glslangValidator.exe

Now to use the wanted VulkanSDK version, go to dependencies.lua and change "VulkanSDKVersion" to the VulkanSDK version



Folder structure:
vendor/
    vulkan/
        ##VulkanSDKVersion##
            bin/
                shaderc_shared.dll
                shaderc_sharedd.dll
                VkLayer_khronos_validation.dll
                VkLayer_khronos_validation.json
                VkLayer_khronos_validation.pdb
            include/
                ... $VulkanSDK/Include ...
            lib/
                shaderc_sharedd.lib
                spirv-cross-cored.lib
                shaderc_shared.lib
                spirv-cross-core.lib
                vulkan-1.lib
            License.txt
